description: Yi He discusses the journey of Binance, emphasizing the importance of community support and the commitment to building the industry. He reflects on the past six years and expresses optimism for the future, urging founders to persevere regardless of market conditions.
topic_summary: Yi He shares insights on Binance's growth and future plans, highlighting community support and the ongoing commitment to innovation in the cryptocurrency industry. He encourages founders to remain resilient in both bull and bear markets [t=66:04].
